[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001000 4
1 000000001 1
2 000100010 2
3 000000000 a
4 010001111 5
5 000110111 5
6 111000110 5
7 001001000 2

01 10 000000010 1
12 21 001000000 1
23 32 000000000 a match 3
34 43 000000111 3
45 54 000000110 2
56 65 001000000 1
67 76 001001000 2 match 7
70 07 000000011 2

02 20 000000000 a match 3
13 31 000000010 1
24 42 000000000 a match 3
35 53 010000110 3
46 64 000000000 a match 3
57 75 111000010 4
60 06 000000000 a match 3
71 17 001100010 3

03 30 000000011 2
14 41 000100010 2 match 2
25 52 001000000 1
36 63 000001000 1
47 74 000100011 3
50 05 000000010 1
61 16 001000000 1
72 27 001000000 1

15 51 001000010 2
26 62 001000000 1
37 73 010001011 4
